name_en: Small sizeрҹҺ–пёҸрҹҺ–пёҸрҹҺ–пёҸHobo Bagрҹ‘ӣChanel 24P Hobo Love it love it/вқӨпёҸSmall size Calfskin, satisfied with the shoulder strap length, and it's light. The capacity is a real surprise. It looks small but actually holds a lot[Hook]. The capacity is more than double that of the heart-shaped clasp chubby bag[Wow]. The hobo leather is shiny, and the lining is black fabric. Dimensions: 15.5 x 20.5 x 6.5cm Style AS 4320
